Video.summary: Imogene Coca and Vic Damone appear in sketches about air travel, taboo commercials, and "The Old Folks"
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Vic Damone

Video.summary: Andy Griffith & Barbara McNair star. Featuring a coach who brings work home, & a number about Smokey The Bear.
Video.title: Andy Griffith, Barbara Mcnair

Video.summary: Betty White plays Eunice's sister as "The Family" celebrates Mama's birthday.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Betty White

Video.summary: Vincent Price stars in a salute to horror. George imagines he is gambler, & a pregnant pause on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Vincent Price

Video.summary: Maggie Smith returns to guest star as the erudite teacher of Eunice and Ed's son Bubba in "The Family."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Maggie Smith

Video.summary: Guest Glen Campbell appears in a sketch spoofing "A Star Is Born." Also, Tim is a guinea pig for a cure.
Video.title: Glen Campbell

Video.summary: Guest star Soupy Sales plays a hospital patient, and joins Carol for the movie spoof "Mildred Fierce."
Video.title: Soupy Sales, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Sid Caesar guests in the WWII spoof "Mrs. Magnificent." On "Carol & Sis", Roger gets dragged into a PTA show.
Video.title: Sid Caesar

Video.summary: Mel Torme and Martha Raye guest. Featuring Martha and Carol as dog-lovers, and spoofs of Disney classics.
Video.title: Martha Raye, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Sketches include: "The West Dakota County Fair", "War Is Heck", and another visit with "The Old Folks."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Wayne Rogers, Buddy Ebsen

Video.summary: Phyllis Diller guests. Also, "Dr. Jeckyl and Mr. Hyde" and Bobbie Gentry singing "The Look Of Love."
Video.title: Bobbie Gentry, Phyllis Diller

Video.summary: Among this evening's sketches: "Th Wonderful World Of Prisons", and Carol as "Mrs. Invisible Man."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Barbara Eden, Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence, The Captain & Tennille appear in spoofs, while Steve and Carol reveal a secretary's thoughts.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille

Image.alt: Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille
Steve Lawrence, The Captain And Tennille

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters and Cass Elliot guest star in the latest "As The Stomach Turns".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Bernadette Peters, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Bernadette Peters stars in a sketch about a woman introducing friends to each other. Also, an office visit.
Video.title: Bernadette Peters

Video.summary: Tim Conway guest stars as a hapless bus boy at a "Beniha-ha" restaurant who steps into an absent chef's role.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guests Nancy Wilson and Nanette Fabray are here for tonight's "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Nanette Fabray

Video.summary: Tim Conway & The Pointer Sisters star! Sketches include "Up Your Income", and Tim as Nora Desmond's butler.
Video.title: Tim Conway, The Pointer Sisters

Video.summary: Alice Portnoy is back to wreak more havoc, featuring guest Ronnie Schell and a "Carol & Sis" saga sketch.
Video.title: Nancy Wilson, Ronnie Schell

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway is featured in two sketches, pairing him with Harvey and Carol, respectively.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Tim Conway guests for the movie spoof "Sinful Woman", a presentation of the Lyle-hosted Tearjerker Theatre.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Eunice gets her big break on "The Gong Show!" Also: An interview with the wife of a kidnap victim.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tonight's episode features a take-off of the classic Elizabeth Taylor film "National Velvet".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol introduces the actors who dub voices for Spanish audiences, using a classic "Carol & Sis" sketch.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Richard Chamberlain stars in "Gone With The Breeze". In "Carol & Sis", it's one sibling too many.
Video.title: Dick Chamberlain, Kay Medford

Video.summary: Tim Conway returns! Tim plays a lion, then teams with Harvey as a pair of military aircraft spotters.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Neil Sedaka joins in parodies, Harvey learns not to flirt at the I.R.S. office, & Carol gets guests to leave.
Video.title: Neil Sedaka

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Nanette Fabray star. Featuring Carol as a dowdy secretary, and the spoof "Flight 13 To Nowhere."
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Tim Conway & Steve Lawrence guest! A chimp bites Tim in one sketch, while another looks at relationships.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, and Nancy Wilson all appear as guests on "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson

Image.alt: Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson
Lucille Ball, Eddie Albert, Nancy Wilson

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence and Carol Channing join for a blockbuster tribute to the Academy Awards.
Video.title: Carol Channing, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Scoey Mitchell is Carol's guest. Featuring "The Queen Elizabeth Show", a Q&A and a "Queen & Sis" sketch.
Video.title: Scoey Mitchell

Video.summary: Joel Grey & Vincent Price guest. They play guests at a hotel where Carol is the operator. Also "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Joel Grey, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Martha Raye and Betty Grable guest in "As The Stomach Turns." Q&A and a contest reveals stiff completion.
Video.title: Martha Raye, Betty Grable

Video.summary: Features "Carol & Sis", where Harvey avoids Carol, and a take-off on "Back Street"..here called "Back Alley."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: The conclusion of the fifth-season "Family Show" finale brings to a close the spoof "The Doily Sisters."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Buddy Ebsen & Wayne Rogers star! Includes: "The West Dakota County Fair", "War Is Heck", and "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Buddy Ebsen, Wayne Rogers

Video.summary: Carol appears in a Late, Late Movie presentation of "A Swiped Life"-- take-off of "A Stolen Life."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Jonathan Winters returns in "The Wonderful World Of Hospitals." "Carol & Sis" finds Carol stuck in a helmet.
Video.title: Jonathan Winters

Video.summary: David Frost and Marilyn Horne star. Frost plays a Rolls Royce dealer, while Horne takes the musical spotlight.
Video.title: Marilyn Horne, David Frost
